metadata.title: YouTube Automation AI - Turn Long Videos Into Viral Shorts
metadata.description: Turn one long video into multiple viral-style short videos with AI clip detection, hook generation, and caption workflows.
metadata.keywords: youtube automation ai, long video to short video, viral shorts, faceless youtube workflow, ai clip generator

hero.label: Waitlist Open · Early Access
hero.title: Turn one long video into viral-ready shorts
hero.description:
YouTube Automation AI is built for creators and teams that want to repurpose long-form content faster.
We focus on clip selection, hook structure, caption packaging, and repeatable publishing workflows.
hero.audience: Best for faceless channels, repurposing teams, and creator operators who need speed without losing quality.
key_points: Extract multiple short candidates from one long video
Apply proven viral hook and pacing patterns
Generate captions and title angles for short feeds
Ship faster with one repeatable workflow

proof_card.title: What users want this to solve
proof_card.quote: “I need a reliable system to turn long-form ideas into short-form output every week, without editing bottlenecks.”
proof_card.note: We’re currently validating demand and onboarding waitlist users in small batches.

metrics.label: Target clips from one source video
Unified workflow for script → clip → publish
New waitlist invites sent in cohorts

input.placeholder: Enter your email to join early access

submit.hint: We only send access and product updates. No spam.

hero.tip: Current focus: long-video clipping + viral-format mimic + SEO growth content.

introduce.title: What the product is built to do
introduce.label: Core Problem
introduce.description: Most teams already have long-form content but struggle to consistently produce short clips with strong hooks. We focus on making that process structured and repeatable.

image.alt: Long video to short video workflow

items.title: Find clip-worthy moments faster
items.description: Identify high-signal moments in podcasts, interviews, tutorials, and webinar recordings.

items.title: Use viral structure instead of guesswork
items.description: Apply repeatable patterns for hooks, pacing, and retention from proven short-video formats.

items.title: Package clips for short feeds
items.description: Generate subtitle and title options aligned with short-form viewing behavior.

items.title: Build an SEO-backed content engine
items.description: Pair short-video output with demand-driven blog and metadata strategy.

usage.title: How the workflow works
usage.description: A practical loop from long-form source to short-form distribution:
usage.label: 3-Step Process

items.title: Input long-form source
items.description: Upload your long video or reference an existing YouTube source.

items.title: Generate short candidates
items.description: Score scenes, apply hook templates, and prepare subtitle-ready short drafts.

items.title: Publish and iterate
items.description: Ship clips, track performance, and refine the next batch from real feedback.

benefits.title: Why this approach is effective
benefits.label: Advantages
benefits.description: The goal is not just faster editing — it is consistent short-form output that compounds over time.

items.title: Higher output from existing content
items.description: Repurpose one recording into multiple short assets instead of publishing only once.

items.title: Repeatability over random creativity
items.description: Use structure and templates that can be reused by operators and teams.

items.title: Less production friction
items.description: Reduce handoffs across scripting, clipping, captioning, and packaging steps.

stats.title: Current validation focus
stats.description: The product is in SEO and waitlist stage, focused on proving demand around the core short-video workflow.

items.description: Core waitlist funnel for early users

features.description: Core clipping features are being validated, while foundational product systems already exist.

items.title: Blog System

items.title: International-ready Architecture

items.title: API-first Foundation
items.description: Backend route foundation is ready for feature iteration and integrations.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Clear status on what is available now and what is being validated.

items.question: Is the long-video clipping feature fully launched?
items.answer: Not yet. We are in SEO and waitlist validation stage while core workflows are being refined.

items.question: What problem are you solving first?
items.answer: Turning long videos into short, viral-style clips with stronger hooks and faster production cycles.

items.question: How can I get early access?
items.answer: Submit your email in the hero section. We invite users in weekly cohorts.

items.question: Do sign-in and billing systems already exist?
items.answer: Yes. Infrastructure for auth and payment is retained and ready to support rollout.

items.question: Who is this product for?
items.answer: Creators, solo operators, and small teams running faceless or repurposed-content channels.
